Demon

Demon
Attributes
NameDemon
Hit Points8200
Experience Points6000
Summon--
Convince--
AbilitiesMelee (0-520), Fire Wave (0-300), Great Energy Beam (0-380), Mana Drain (0-120), Self-Healing (80-250)
ResistancesPhysical (100%), Holy (-25%), Death (5%), Fire (100%), Energy (50%), Ice (-10%), Earth (40%)
BehaviorFights until death. A demon attacks with both melee and distance attacks.
Maximal Damage1570
Speed128
LocationHero Cave, Edron Demon Cave, Goroma
LootDemon Horn, Fire Axe, Golden Legs, Magic Plate Armor, Platinum Coin (0-6), Gold Coin (0-100)

The Demon is one of the most feared creatures in Tibia. They are very powerful and can deal massive damage.
